_comment: OpenClaw configuration for WordClaw CMS integration.
Copy this file to ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (or merge the mcpServers
Two options are shown below — pick ONE and delete the other:
1. 'wordclaw-stdio'  — launches the MCP server as a child process (local dev)
2. 'wordclaw-remote' — connects to a running WordClaw instance over HTTP

wordclaw-stdio._comment: Option 1: Local stdio transport — starts WordClaw MCP as a child process

wordclaw-remote._comment: Option 2: Remote Streamable HTTP — connects to a running WordClaw server
